Building Material Supplier

Our Story Since 1999

Built on Trust, Grown on Quality

Established as a proprietor firm in 1999 by Late Shri Ritu Raj Singh, Sony Enterprises began with a simple vision — to bring quality construction materials to the people of the Andaman & Nicobar Islands. Over the past two and a half decades, that vision has grown into one of the region's most trusted names in building supplies. Founded on the principles of quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction, the company continues to uphold the values and legacy established by its founder.

Today, we are a leading wholesaler, manufacturer, and retailer of a wide range of products including tiles and tile equipment, luxury sanitaryware, bathroom fittings, CP and PTMT fittings, PVC water tanks, CPVC pipes and fittings, WPC doors and frames, chequer tiles, and paver blocks — serving homeowners, contractors, builders, and commercial projects across Sri Vijaya Puram and the wider Andaman Islands.

25+ Years of Experience

A proprietary firm rooted in the Andaman Islands since 1999, with decades of expertise in wholesale, retail, and supply of construction materials.

Island-wide Delivery

Reliable logistics and timely delivery of materials to projects across the Andaman & Nicobar Islands.

Premium Quality Products

Every product we stock and supply is sourced from reputed manufacturers — because your project deserves nothing less.
